Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.sync

Class SynchroManager

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.sync.SynchroManager
public class SynchroManager extends Object
Class able to load and save EMF/Rodin models.

    • getDefault

    • getModelForRoot

      public InternalElement getModelForRoot(IInternalElement root)
      Gets the model for the given Rodin root element.
      Parameters:
      root - the rodin internal root element
      Returns:
      the corresponding EMF light model

    • implicitLoad

      public static void implicitLoad(LightElement parent, IInternalElement iParent)
      Computes the list of providers for a parent element type and iterates on them to get and add the implicit children to the parent light element.
      Parameters:
      parent - the light element that we want to add implicit children to
      iParent - the IInternalElement counterpart of the parent

    • loadInternalElementFor

      public static InternalElement loadInternalElementFor(IRodinElement iElement, LightElement root)
